doc.field: The finding aid was prepared by Ala Younis, Ibrahim Mohamed Ali, Dina Taha, Anneka Lenssen, and Salwa Mikdadi for al Mawrid Arab Center for the Study of Art, NYUAD
1. Black and white photocopies of reproductions, between 1970 and 1991 with some undated.
